truth_boundary: Hand-coded acoustic prior and filter-template seed only. This does not prove source identity certainty, original stems, performer/person identity, lyric truth, genre truth, or creator intent.
usage_boundary: Use these priors later with OME rolling arrangement windows, gammatone/spectral envelope evidence, MIDI/pitch support, and local dynamic evidence to form ranked hypotheses. Do not use this seed index by itself as recognition.

priors.truth_boundary: Acoustic prior only. This does not prove source identity certainty, original stems, performer/person identity, lyric truth, genre truth, or creator intent.
